title: Ghee, haldi, ashwagandha: How ancient ingredients became global superfoods
description: Discover how three ancient Ayurvedic ingredients became a multi-billion dollar global wellness phenomenon, backed by science, market data, and centuries of tradition.

title: Irish Proverb of the Day: ‘You’ll never plow a field by turning it over...’ This ancient success warning feels uncomfortably accurate in 2026 if you are still waiting for the perfect moment
description: Irish Proverb of the Day: Today’s proverb delivers a simple yet powerful message: dreams become goals only when they are matched with action. Success is rarely the result of perfect planning alone. More often, it is built through consistent effort, forward momentum and the willingness to take the first step...

title: Towers Of Silence Go Viral: Ancient Funeral Ritual Sparks Disease Spread Fears And Heated Debate
description: The Towers of Silence, an ancient Zoroastrian funerary practice, have gone viral, sparking global debate over cultural traditions, public health concerns, and the impact of social media on sacred rituals.

title: Dressing visitors in ancient China's imperial splendor is booming in Beijing
description: Studios near the Forbidden City in Beijing are transforming visitors into empresses from ancient China as young people explore a revival of traditional culture

title: Scientists May Have Found the Key to Ancient Life Hiding at the Bottom of an Asteroid Crater
